_HOW_TO_EDIT: Every outbound link on the site lives in this file, except hospital website links, which live next to each hospital in locations.json.
Fill in each empty "url". While a url is empty the site shows a dashed 'link needed' flag in its place; paste the real link and the flag disappears automatically.
profiles: rendered in the 'Verify his record' row in every page footer. Entries with "featured": true also appear in the strip under the homepage testimonials (keep to 3 or 4).
press: rendered on the Voices page. "featured": true renders as a large card (keep to 4); everything else renders in the compact list below the cards. Add as many list entries as you like.
interview: the video on the homepage 'Meet your consultant' section. Paste the YouTube, Vimeo or hosted video link; the card opens it in a new tab.

interview.title: In conversation: Professor Gupta on treating atrial fibrillation

press.headline: Global heart rhythm expert conducts free training at PGIMER
press.note: “I am using the opportunity to perform complex cases in five cities and train local cardiologists in these procedures.”

press.headline: UK cardiologist kicks off India tour from PGIMER
press.note: Performing the costly procedures without taking “a single paisa” from patients or hospitals, even bearing his own travel expenses.

press.headline: UK Heart Rhythm Expert Begins India Tour from Chd
press.note: “A philanthropist and proud alumnus of PGIMER Chandigarh and AIIMS New Delhi… reflecting his commitment to expanding access to advanced cardiac care.”

press.headline: Global heart expert to give free treatment, train doctors across India
press.note: “As a proud alumnus of PGIMER Chandigarh and AIIMS New Delhi, I have retained strong professional and personal links with India.”
